//: shadcn/ui config — FRAMEWORK-OWNED REFERENCE (ADR-0010). Records the in-repo conventions (style, CSS-variable tokens, the @/ aliases) so primitives under src/components/ui/ are consistent. NOTE (ADR-0009): primitives are VENDORED as frozen, in-repo files here rather than pulled via `npx shadcn add` — for reproducibility (the component source is committed, not re-fetched at build time). The network-egress boundary was retired (ADR-0024), so the CLI would now run, but manual vendoring is kept deliberately. To add a primitive the foundation copies its source in-repo (this file documents the target conventions).
